spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous spacing, architectural precision, dramatic negative space to feel premium. Focus on one card at a time.

surface_strategies.main_background: Solid deep anthracite with subtle noise texture overlay to feel like dark felt or ancient stone.
surface_strategies.cards: Solid golden beige (#F2ECD9) with very subtle inner shadow to mimic premium thick cardstock. Sharp edges or very minimal rounding (rounded-sm).
surface_strategies.feedback_panels: Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) with 1px gold or red border depending on correct/incorrect.
surface_strategies.buttons: Flat solid background, 1px subtle gold border for secondary, solid gold background for primary (with dark text).

components.buttons: Shadcn Button customized: removing default rounded-md to rounded-sm, adding tracking-widest uppercase for primary actions.
components.cards: Custom HTML/Tailwind for the game cards to allow 3D flip animations and precise layout, Shadcn Card for progress/stats.
components.progress_bar: Shadcn Progress with gold indicator and dark track.
components.dialogs: Shadcn Dialog for end-of-session summary, styled with glassmorphism and dark luxury vibe.
components.typography: Use pure HTML tags (h1, h2, p) with custom Tailwind classes.

motion.card_flip: 3D transform flip on answer validation (framer-motion or CSS transform).
motion.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1 with shadow-lg for interactive elements.
motion.page_transition: Fade in and slight upward slide (duration-500).

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border-[#D4AF37]/30 for structure, NEVER thick borders.

hero_background.description: Black with gold swirls. Use as a very faint, low opacity (10-15%) background texture for the home screen to give a luxurious, atmospheric feel.

card_texture.description: Gold abstract close up. Can be used as a subtle mask or accent inside the game cards or for the 'Mastery' badge.

strategy_icon_1.description: Chess piece on dark table. Use as a decorative element on the 'Progression/Stats' screen or empty states.

strategy_icon_2.description: Statue of a man riding a horse. Use for the 'History/Historical Example' section in the feedback panel to ground it in history.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text on the golden beige cards is pure black or very dark anthracite (#0A0B0E) for maximum legibility. Text on dark backgrounds must be off-white.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for the card flipping animations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with duotone weight for a premium feel.
For the Home Screen: Center alignment is acceptable here for a cinematic title entrance. Use the hero_background image with very low opacity.
For the Game Session: Do NOT center everything. The card should be prominent. Question text left-aligned, multiple choice options as wide, distinct buttons with hover states.
For Feedback Panel: When a user answers, reveal the historical explanation below the card. Use a distinct background (like glassmorphism) for the feedback to separate it from the card.
Ensure the Spaced Repetition logic is MOCKED effectively via a local state/timer if a real backend isn't connected. Highlight 'mocked' in the final summary.
Apply data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, cards, answers).
Avoid Shadcn 'Card' wrapper for the actual game playing cards; build a custom div with the golden beige background and precise padding to look like a physical artifact.
Inject a grain/noise texture across the entire body for a tactile, 'non-digital' feel.
